zh.siteSubtitle: 詹姆斯·雷德菲尔德灵性冒险小说（1993）
zh.homeIntro1: 《塞莱斯廷预言》（The Celestine Prophecy）是美国作家詹姆斯·雷德菲尔德（James Redfield）于1993年出版的灵性冒险小说。小说讲述主人公在秘鲁丛林中追寻一部古代手稿的故事，手稿中包含九条关于人类灵性进化的「觉悟」（Insights）。
zh.homeIntro2: 该书最初由作者自费出版，随后迅速风靡全球，在《纽约时报》畅销榜停留超过三年，全球累计销量超过2300万册，被翻译成34种语言。它被视为1990年代新时代运动的标志性作品，深刻影响了大众对同步性、能量觉知和灵性成长的理解。
zh.homeIntro3: 雷德菲尔德随后出版了续作《第十种觉悟》（1996）和《香巴拉的秘密》（1999），将觉悟从九条扩展到十二条。本站整理了书中的核心预言，并对其与现实世界趋势的对应关系进行了评估。
zh.coreQuote: 「当足够多的人达到临界质量的觉醒时，这种意识将以不可阻挡的方式传遍整个文化，我们将建立一种全新的、以灵性真理为基础的文明。」
keyPointsList: 1993年 —— 《塞莱斯廷预言》出版，提出九大觉悟
1996年 —— 续作《第十种觉悟》出版，探讨前世记忆与世界愿景
1999年 —— 《香巴拉的秘密》出版，引入祈祷能量与第十一、十二觉悟
2006年 —— 同名电影上映，将觉悟可视化呈现
2011年 —— 《第十二种觉悟》出版，预言2012年灵性觉醒的关键转折
sourceList: 预言内容整理自《塞莱斯廷预言》系列小说原文（Wikipedia）
作者官方网站提供的觉悟概述（Celestine Vision）
验证评价基于公开社会趋势报道和学术研究
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用古卷轴符号——小说核心情节围绕在秘鲁丛林中发现的一部古代手稿展开

en.siteSubtitle: Spiritual Adventure Novel by James Redfield (1993)
en.homeIntro1: The Celestine Prophecy is a spiritual adventure novel published in 1993 by American author James Redfield. The story follows a protagonist's journey through the Peruvian rainforest in search of an ancient manuscript containing Nine Insights about humanity's spiritual evolution.
en.homeIntro2: Originally self-published, the book quickly became a global phenomenon, spending over three years on the New York Times bestseller list and selling over 23 million copies worldwide in 34 languages. It is considered a landmark work of the 1990s New Age movement, profoundly shaping public understanding of synchronicity, energy awareness, and spiritual growth.
en.homeIntro3: Redfield later published sequels The Tenth Insight (1996) and The Secret of Shambhala (1999), expanding the insights from nine to twelve. This site compiles the core prophecies from the series and evaluates their correspondence with real-world trends.
en.coreQuote: "When enough individuals reach a critical mass of awakening, this consciousness will spread unstoppably through the entire culture, and we will build an entirely new civilization based on spiritual truth."
keyPointsList: 1993 —— The Celestine Prophecy published, introducing the Nine Insights
1996 —— Sequel The Tenth Insight published, exploring past-life memory and world vision
1999 —— The Secret of Shambhala published, introducing prayer energy and the 11th/12th Insights
2006 —— Feature film adaptation released, visualizing the Insights
2011 —— The Twelfth Insight published, predicting a pivotal spiritual awakening around 2012
sourceList: Prophecies compiled from The Celestine Prophecy novel series (Wikipedia)
Insight summaries from the author's official website (Celestine Vision)
Verification based on public social trend reports and academic research
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: ancient scroll symbol — the novel's central plot revolves around an ancient manuscript discovered in the Peruvian rainforest
